# Provider Validation Matrix

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to integration gates](../integration-gates.md)

Provider PASS/limited/blocked evidence is owned by the architecture integration matrix and provider validation manifest.

- `docs/30-architecture/provider-validation-matrix.riido.json` records provider-specific evidence rows.
- OpenClaw remains `supports_worktree=false`, so worktree-required tasks must fail scheduling with `MISSING_REQUIRED_SURFACE:worktree`.
- A skipped integration test, detected binary, or SaaS completed thread alone must not be claimed as filesystem side-effect evidence.
